header: Three layers. One package. Zero template projects.

items.title: 255 content elements
items.content: Ten groups of production-ready Content Blocks — from heroes to footers — each with a backend preview and seeded demo content. The work you'd normally budget weeks for is already done.

items.title: 49 Fluid 5 components
items.content: 17 atoms, 28 molecules, and 4 layout primitives like d:atom.button and d:layout.section keep markup consistent everywhere — including the custom elements you build on top.

items.title: 15 theme presets
items.content: Five shadcn/ui presets plus ten house designs, all with dark mode and WCAG 2.2-checked contrast. Switch sitewide or per page subtree — at runtime, no rebuild.
